claim_a: Lazar began working at S4 in late 1988.
claim_b: Lazar never had any involvement with S4 or Area 51.

claim_a: Lazar holds degrees from MIT and Caltech.
claim_b: Neither MIT nor Caltech have records of Lazar's enrollment.

claim_a: Element 115 serves as a stable fuel source for gravity propulsion.
claim_b: Synthesized moscovium (Element 115) is highly unstable with a half-life under one second.

claim_a: S4 housed nine extraterrestrial craft of different designs.
claim_b: No physical evidence or satellite imagery has confirmed an S4 facility at Papoose Lake.

claim_a: Lazar's W-2 from the Department of Naval Intelligence confirms his employment.
claim_b: The W-2 contained formatting inconsistencies not found in authentic government documents.

claim_a: Lazar passed multiple polygraph tests confirming his truthfulness.
claim_b: Polygraph results were inconclusive on key questions about S4.
